_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: We used transcription data collected and analyzed by the NF1 Systems Biology and Microarray Consortium and integrated it with cataloged in the Secreted Protein Database. After importing 3,721 RefSeq IDs...we focused on 1,664 transcripts that were upregulated
details: Successfully identified 1,664 transcripts upregulated in cells and primary tumors relative to NHSCs from transcription data
